programme.desc: Luffy leads a daring – but foolish – raid on Crocodile’s casino. His poor planning lands him behind bars with Captain Smoker – and more importantly, leaves Vivi unprotected.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the Straw Hats are stuck in the clink, King Cobra addresses the starving people of Nanohana. Will his unbelievable revelation drive his subjects past the brink of rebellion?

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Crocodile snatches Vivi off the back of a giant crab, but Luffy’s not having it. The rubber-man goes toe-to-toe with the sandman in a battle that will end in bloodshed.

programme.desc: Crocodile puts Luffy down for a never-ending dirt nap, and the Straw Hats get a lift from a crabby ally in their race to stop the looming rebellion.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard finds himself facing a strenuous test of his loyalty to Starfleet, one which the other members of the crew are struggling to cope with, whilst Wesley faces an equally challenging entrance exam at Starfleet Academy.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise searches for answers as to why three Klingon warriors were the only survivors aboard a freighter just inside the Neutral Zone which was seemingly attacked by a Ferengi ship.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters a planet long dead, but technical equipment still functions for the purpose of selling off its arsenal, along with self sufficiency.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters two neighboring cultures, one suffering from a plague, the other marketing a cure, and learn that nothing is as simple as it seems.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While en route back to the Enterprise, the shuttlecraft carrying Counselor Troi loses power and gets caught in a planet's gravity well.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The crew of the Enterprise races against time, itself, when a scientist experiments with time, and claims to have opened a window into another dimension, which must be closed.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After diverting to a secret meeting with an old friend and some of Starfleet's finest commanders, Picard finds the Horatio blown to bits just hours after the meeting and he returns the Enterprise to Earth looking for answers.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: While assigned to investigate missing outposts in the Neutral Zone, the Enterprise revives three cryogenically frozen people found aboard a wayward derelict Earth vessel.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Deanna is impregnated by an unknown alien life-form, and Dr. Katherine Pulaski joins the Enterprise as the ship's new Chief Medical Officer.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters a mysterious void in space and when they move in closer to investigate further, it envelops them and they can't get out.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: When the Enterprise arrives a few days early at its rendezvous point to meet the USS Victory, the crew have a bit of leisure time on their hands.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Enterprise responds to a request for medical assistance from Dr. Ira Graves, considered by many to be the greatest living mind in the universe.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Locked in a battle with a Drone Command Ship, the Destiny is surprised by the arrival of the aliens that abducted Rush and Chloe. After Destiny's position is revealed, the crew again comes under heavy attack. But this time, they have a plan.

programme.title: Stargate Universe
programme.desc: Excitement spreads through the ship as Eli believes he’s found a way to dial Earth. But Dr. Rush has serious reservations about abandoning Destiny, and when the crew is interrupted by a distress call, it may just change the plans of the Destiny.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: A 15-year-old infiltrates the SGC with the startling news that he is Colonel Jack O'Neill, having mysteriously reverse aged 30 years overnight. Possessing O'Neill's knowledge, exact DNA and, above all, his attitude, can he really be O'Neill?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Through the help of Daniel, Teal'c visualizes that Rya'c and Bra'tac are being held prisoner in a Goa'uld death camp. With SG-1's help, Teal'c sets out to rescue his son and his mentor, but can he overcome his fears in time?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Six thousand light-years away, O'Neill and the SG-1 team discover a devastated universe where the inhabitants must live in a protective dome. They survive through an all-controlling computer system called the Link. But is it a savior, or a curse?

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 finds a crashed spaceship containing hundreds of people in a cryogenic sleep. Stunned by an unseen weapon, the team is struck unconscious and, upon awakening, discovers that several of the frozen personalities now inhabit Daniel's body!

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: An SGC Naquadah mining operation is attacked by a native tribe of Unas. SG-1 is sent to protect the miners and discovers that the Unas are guarding land they believe is sacred. Instead of eradicating the Unas, Daniel races to negotiate with them.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: The Serakkin Warrick proposes to share his planet's technology with Earth in exchange for Carter helping him win a space race. Carter eagerly agrees and copilots the craft through a perilous obstacle course; but the race isn't without risks.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Dr. Felger creates a computer virus meant to disable Goa'uld-controlled worlds. When the program malfunctions and spreads throughout the Stargate network, O'Neill, Teal'c and Daniel are trapped off-world, with danger looming around the corner.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters a race of women warriors whose survival depends on symbiotes harvested from Jaffa. Teal'c and SG-1 must convince the warriors' high priestess to put aside her fear of reliance on a life-saving drug before the Goa'uld destroy them.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: SG-1 encounters a very advanced bio-engineered warrior endowed with super strength, created by Anubis. While the team sets out to locate the origin of this new foe, Daniel travels to South America in search of a device left on Earth by the Ancients.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Having found the location of the warrior base, Carter is assigned a recon mission to determine Anubis's plans. Meanwhile, O'Neill mounts a mission to South America to rescue Daniel who has been kidnapped by Honduran rebels demanding a ransom.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Having sustained an injury during an alien attack, Carter awakens to find herself abandoned on the Prometheus and trapped. With only her subconscious as a guide, Carter must find a way out of the nebula before it destroys the ship and her way home.

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Jonas Quinn returns to the SGC with news that Naquadria mines of Kelowna are not native to his world and are threatening to cause an explosion in the planet's core that will leave his home world uninhabitable and millions dead.

programme.desc: Pilgrim leads the hunt for near-fatally wounded Sunny. The Widow confronts her inner demons in an attempt to restore her Gift.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It’s a retelling of 'Sleeping Beauty' – but our focus is on the fairy that didn’t get her invitation and stubbornly refuses to listen to the reason why.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: This is the story of 'Rapunzel', but with a twist. Princess Rapunzel (Rainbow Sherbet) has always preferred being called Rap and liked doing things her way.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake’s childhood friend, Lime Lite, has hit it big in Berrywood, movie capital of Strawberryland.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum rallies her friends to be secret 'shoemaker’s elves' for Raspberry and help her finish a dress, but things comically get out of hand.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: When the prize violets Lemon is raising for the flower show start mysteriously disappearing, Lemon jumps to some wrong conclusions.

programme.desc: Strawberry has her hands full when she agrees to babysit a young Berrykin who has magical powers.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Polly Pocket
programme.desc: As host of the Flying Disc Fetch event at the Littleton Pet Games, Polly and Lila are unsure when a blind dog signs up to compete. // Jake is coming to visit Littleton for the big epic party at Littleton's Party Mansion!

programme.title: Polly Pocket

programme.desc: Apple's rave review on her berryweb page of Strawberry's new dessert starts a booming mail order dessert business for Berry Bitty City.

programme.desc: Strawberry Shortcake travels to magical Holidayland with Honey Pie Pony, searching for the perfect presents to give her friends.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer
programme.desc: Melinda is bewildered when she deals with the ghost of Jason Bennett, a man who died 10 years prior before his high school graduation.

programme.title: Ghost Whisperer

programme.title: Charmed
programme.desc: Paige brings a baby-robot and gives it to Piper and Leo to see if they can conciliate having a baby of their own and vanquishing demons.

programme.title: Charmed

programme.title: Charmed

programme.desc: Phil (Donald Faison) uses Holly's assistant to help him land a star jockey as a client, but he's got his eyes on a bigger prize. Haskell (Wayne Knight) talks Stuart into selling sentimental mementos from his marriage but Stuart has trouble letting go.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Haskell (Wayne Knight) panics when his online girlfriend surprises him with a visit because he used Phil's (Donald Faison) picture as his own. Holly discovers a homeless man in the laundry room and learns appearances can be very deceiving.

programme.title: The Exes
programme.desc: Stuart's (David Alan Basche) work life is turned upside down when Phil (Donald Faison) sleeps with his dental assistant. Holly (Kristen Johnston) lends Eden (Kelly Stables) some outfits and soon discovers her clothes have a better social life than her.

programme.title: Kim's Convenience

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad puede lograr ser completamente libre si se anula su matrimonio con Alcides, pero las circunstancias cambian para Hugo cuando los inversionistas se enteran de la verdad sobre la mina.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo está en un estado de conmoción, Daniel averigua si su sangre tiene el componente para salvarse de la catalepsia, y Michelle aprovecha para acercarse. Arturo recibe una dolorosa noticia.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Los inversionistas quieren recuperar su dinero a toda costa, pero Arturo se debate entre la vida y la muerte. Alcides cree saber quién esconde a Hugo, Soledad y Michelle tratan de engañarlo.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Alcides tiene un plan definido para ganar la confianza de Soledad, pero no sabe lo que está por descubrir. Daniel llega al laboratorio de Max para analizar si Aurora puede curarse.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Ricardo recibe una llamada de Constanza y no puede contener el llanto. Una carta anónima llega a las manos de Gastón. Verónica y Lucho le alertan que se trata de una trampa. Antonia juega con Alberto y después manda a que le den una brutal golpiza.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Los aliados de Verónica la comparan con Antonia. Ricardo está desesperado por encontrar a su madre y sospecha que se esconde tras una burka en la Fortaleza. La policía encuentra a Alberto gravemente herido en plena calle. Lagarto detiene a Max.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Max tiene una coartada y Valentina la corrobora. David visita a su tío en la cárcel y se reconcilian. Verónica visita al moribundo Alberto y luego de enumerarle sus horribles crímenes, le revela su identidad. Constanza se abre ante su hijo.

programme.title: La patrona
programme.desc: Verónica le dice a Ricardo que Alberto está en pleno uso de sus facultades mentales y puede rendir testimonio de la agresión. Pero los dos llegan muy tarde. Fríamente, Antonia le corta el flujo de aire y le habla a su examante, mientras lo ve morir.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Ruth y Juan toman a Dínora de rehén y huyen, pero son recapturados y llevados a la montaña para matarlos, sus hermanos merodean por los alrededores. Rosario y Armando tienen un duelo a tiros.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Armando llega al hospital con un balazo en el pecho, mientras Juan y Ruth hacen el último esfuerzo por sobrevivir. Antes de huir, Dínora llama a Norma para decirle que Juan no regresará jamás.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: Una caravana de rescate recorre el territorio en medio de la noche, las sospechas de que Dínora es la culpable del secuestro son corroboradas al hallar a Juan y a Ruth en un camino solitario.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes
programme.desc: En una fiesta de bienvenida en la hacienda de los Reyes, Juan revela sus temores sobre algo terrible relacionado con Dínora. Fernando no se salva de la furia de las hermanas Elizondo.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Soledad puede lograr ser completamente libre si se anula su matrimonio con Alcides, pero las circunstancias cambian para Hugo cuando los inversionistas se enteran de la verdad sobre la mina.

programme.title: La traición
programme.desc: Hugo está en un estado de conmoción, Daniel averigua si su sangre tiene el componente para salvarse de la catalepsia, y Michelle aprovecha para acercarse. Arturo recibe una dolorosa noticia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: After Pugsley befriends Gorgo, a circus gorilla, Gorgo decides to follow Pugsley and Gomez home, where is accepted as one of the family. But Gorgo gives Morticia's tea guests, the Ladies League members, quite a shock.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A pair of bank robbers are welcomed as Halloween trick-or-treaters by Morticia and Gomez. The creepy atmosphere of the house, Morticia's smoldering holiday punch, and Lurch's ominous presence impel the crooks to abandon their plans.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Lionel Barker, a former suitor of Morticia's, shows up, Gomez is jealous. But he's soon calmed when he learns that Barker is after Mildred, the new maid. The Addamses then discover that Barker is a con man--after Mildred's money, not her love.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Newlyweds move in next door. But the honeymoon loses its tranquility when Uncle Fester enters their house through a tunnel and they flee in terror at the sight of Lurch, Grandmama sharpening her ax, and Morticia and Gomez bathing the octopus.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family faces a crisis when Wednesday packs her spider and runs away (after being scolded for playing with Uncle Fester's TNT). When they try to file a missing person report, a detective is anxious to retire early due to their story.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Official visitors from an unfriendly nation receive the shock of their lives when they decide to exploit the Addams Family as an average uncultured family. The visitors are shaken up by Morticia's carnivorous plants among other things.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's cousin, Melancholia, wants to marry Clarence P. Harvey after most of her marital prospects have joined the Foreign Legion. Clarence recoils when Melancholia puts on a campaign to win him, backed by Morticia, Gomez and Clarence's boss.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes a veritable gazelle when he takes dancing lessons at Gomez and Morticia's suggestion after he admits to being a wallflower at social functions. Each member of the Addams Family teaches Lurch a different step.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama's paintings leave an art critic speechless, so Gomez sends for his friend, Sam Picasso, to teach Grandmama to paint in the abstract. The starving artist ignores Grandmama's and Morticia's work as he eats and paints.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Rockland Cartright III is a beatnik who crashes his motorbike into a tree and recuperates at the Addams house. Each regards the other as an oddity, although the family learns to appreciate certain aspects of Rockland's life.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Mr. Briggs, the postman, is hired by the government to do undercover work in the Addams house. While pretending to be a stamp collector, he investigates rumors that coded radio messages are being sent from the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a series first, 11 new teams of social media stars depart from their own homes all across the country and head for Mexico City, where they set off fireworks and dig deep at an archaeological Roadblock. .

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time ever, the Race travels to Colombia where Racers go mud-diving for emeralds in a volcano.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The race continues in Columbia, where claustrophobia could prevent a racer from going deep into the catacombs to retrieve their next clue.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: A romance blossoms between two racers, and teams are caught in one of the largest-ever footraces to the mat for first place.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The Race reaches new heights as teams climb 15,000 feet in the French Alps, and one team may be in jeopardy of elimination after dropping their clue down a mountain.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: For the first time in THE AMAZING RACE history, teams travel to Yerevan, Armenia, where an express pass is on the line for the winner of the leg.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to the country of Georgia where they learn how to make a traditional candy and go deep into the trenches at an old Georgian winery.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Dubai where they race camels and swim with sharks.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a tight race to the mat, teams row and swim to the Pit Stop located on a boat, where the losers walk the plank and are eliminated.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Racers embark on a gut wrenching, 40-foot plunge and teams make a difficult decision when faced with a double U-turn.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: The final four teams race for a spot in the finale and a high-stakes foot race to the mat will mark the end of one more team's journey.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: As the final three teams race from Shenzhen, China to Santa Barbara, Calif. for the final leg of the Race, they face a gut-wrenching leap of faith.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: In a brand new twist, all 22 Racers are complete strangers who will meet on the starting line. Before "GO," Racers will immediately compete in a challenge that will determine the order for picking a Teammate, based on nothing but first impressions.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Teams travel to Sao Paulo, Brazil where tensions rise between two teams when one goes back on their word.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy has his misgivings when Aunt Bee's old beau shows up in Mayberry and tries to win her over again.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney Fife buys a bloodhound to aid in Mayberry law enforcement.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney and Thelma Lou have a lovers' quarrel. Andy tries to help but only succeeds in getting caught in the middle.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney starts wearing his uniform all the time after being threatened with bodily harm if he's ever caught without it on.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack in Kenya as he tracks a trio of hunting cheetahs, braves a pack of scavenging jackals, and then with his wife Sue meets an extremely endangered and undeniably cute baby black rhino.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he gets a rare behind-the-scenes look at the daily life of the Maasai in a village in Tanzania. Then Jack encounters Hippos, Jackals, Hartebeest, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Predator Alert
programme.desc: Aggressive carnivores sometimes seem like the bad guys of the animal kingdom, but top predators play an essential role: keeping nature in balance. Today, Jungle Jack is counting down nature’s supreme hunters, like lions, crocs, leopards and hyenas!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Gabon's pristine habitats are prime for primates! Come along as Jungle Jack meets up with conservationists to learn about the future of primates big and small, including Chimpanzees, Gorillas, Mandrills and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack is traveling across the globe to bring you his favorite zoo adventures! From Asia's Singapore Zoo to Healesville in Australia, Calgary Zoo in Canada, and Jack's home, see what it's like behind the scenes at some of the world's coolest zoos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a cold-blooded countdown! Crocodiles, Puff Adders, Sea Turtles, Caiman, Fer de Lance and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack, Suzi, and Kathaleen as they immerse themselves with Phinda's rangers who are protecting the reserve's precious population of rhinos and lions!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Some animals have been using social networks for eons, like herds of elephants, colonies of ants and bees, hyena clans and even chimpanzees. Today, Jungle Jack will see what it takes to get “likes” from these special species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack loves elephants and if you do to, join in as he heads to Malaysia to lend a helping hand at an elephant conservation center that is working to save the endangered species.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: From the loveable Koala to the feisty Tasmanian Devil, this adventure to the other side of the world uncovers some of the most unique animals on the planet. Plus Jack and his family get a special tour of the Australia Zoo from the Irwin family.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Rebounding
programme.desc: Meet six amazing animals rallying from the brink of extinction. Bald eagles, American alligators, Florida manatees, Peregrine falcons and more.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack heads into the mystical and mysterious Mashpi cloud forest in Ecuador, where the rainforest meets the Andes Mountains. The forest is buzzing with hundreds of hummingbirds, bats, snakes, and butterflies!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Animal Rest Stops
programme.desc: Jungle Jack is on an epic animal road trip, meeting up with amazing creatures at the wildest rest stops on the planet! Sea turtles nesting in West Africa, whale sharks feeding in Belize, birds wading in Canada and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his daughter Kathaleen as they travel to Tanzania's Tarangire National Park. They search for an elusive elephant called Big Mamma and encounter tons of wildlife along the way.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Today, Jungle Jack is counting down the wildest hooves, paws and claws in the animal kingdom- from the camel’s heavy-duty hooves to an ostrich’s razor-sharp claws, it’s feet first on this Wild Countdown.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: This adventure has Jungle Jack written all over it! Join in as we head deep into the Peruvian Amazon Rainforest get a rare look at Giant River Otters, Pre-Historic Birds, Caimans and much more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack travels to the awe-inspiring Galapagos Islands where he visits a pristine island booming with bio-diversity called Fernandina, home to a huge colony of Marine Iguanas, along with Sea Lions, Sally Lightfoot Crabs, and more!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack goes behind the scenes of the International Anti-Poaching Foundation to see how they are bringing paramilitary techniques to the front lines of conservation in a fight to protect Africa's rhinos.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown: Habitats High & Low
programme.desc: Come along on today’s adventure to Australia’s Great Barrier Reef, Kenya’s Masai Mara, Panama’s Forest Canopy and many more amazing animal ecosystems, as Jack counts them down all the way to number one!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: In Panama's fertile volcanic valley, El Valle, Jack comes face-to-face with critically endangered Panamanian Golden Frogs and other rare and unique amphibians, before zip-lining through the valley!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for an underground adventure with Bats, Bears, Wombats, Rosy Bee-Eaters, and Iguanas.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Come along with Jungle Jack as he embarks on a safari through Florida's Everglades, where he comes face-to-face with alligators and rattlesnakes. And, a rare look at the Native American traditions of the Seminole Tribe.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Jack enters the Mouth of Bull, in Panama's Bocas del Toro! Poison Dart Frogs, Snakes, Jellyfish, Sloths and so much more on this adventure to Panama's Caribbean Coast!

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Travel with Jack, and his wife Sue, to beautiful Cape Town as they discover how South Africa's wildlife is faring in the big city! Then they hit the beach to hang out with a breeding colony of African Penguins.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his wife Sue as they pay a visit to the sunny state of Florida's most unique and inspirational retirement home. They meet up with an amazing couple who is spending their golden years providing a safe and peaceful retirement for horses.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild
programme.desc: Join Jack and his family as they explore Rwanda's Nyungwe Forest encountering wild Chimpanzees, and Colobus Monkeys. They also get lessons from the locals on traditional tea picking and modern beekeeping.

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Wild Countdown
programme.desc: Join Jungle Jack for a rescue mission and meet the charismatic animals that were spared from the brink. Dolphins, Dogs, Asian Elephants, Horses, and more!

programme.title: The New Detectives: Camera Clues
programme.desc: Forensic Photography: Forensic photographers are among the first people at a crime scene, capturing vital clues on film. What do the cameras capture that can't be seen first-hand, and who are the men and women who analyze the camera's clues?

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes when a death seems to be accidental or the result of a tragic accident, it is up to forensic scientists to reveal the deception lying just below the surface.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When teenagers are driven to kill, their victims are but the first to fall. In three such cases, the families of the killers, as well as their communities, become the victims of violent crime.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: CI: Coroner Investigator will reveal the most in-depth look to date into the science of death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Sculpting: Forensic sculptors retrieve people from oblivion. Using clay and an intricate knowledge of anatomy, forensic arts place a face on an unidentified skull, recreating the victim's likeness, which often leads to his name.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Using science as their most powerful weapon, investigators must find these hired killers and make them pay the true price of murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman's body is found and investigators have little time and few clues to lead them to a killer who could strike again. Perpetrators try to conceal their crimes, yet savvy investigators can take the most obscure data and recreate a murder.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When victims of murder know their killers, they are often caught off guard. But even the best-laid plans leave traces of the forsaken trust.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Botany & Geology: Plants help provide oxygen and nutrients for existence. Soil is the fertilizer of life. Yet both can yield clues to the time and location of a person's death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Missing Person: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Worldwide, the number of missing persons nearly triples.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes the scales of justice are balanced by just a few milligrams of evidence – a couple of fibers, a tooth filling, or a smudge on a piece of tape. The biggest cases are often solved by the smallest clues.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Terrorism: Thanks to new technology and, perhaps, the approaching millennium, terrorism is a growing international threat. The Oklahoma City explosion and the bombing of the World Trade Center are just two of the incidents of this growing problem.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Most victims of multiple murderers are meticulously chosen because of a mutual connection with the killer or because they match an intricate set of criteria that fits the killer's MO.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A woman is found dead at the bottom of the basement stairs. As detectives look into the accident, they begin to question the sequence of events.

programme.desc: After a young stablehand kills a notorious gunslinger, he is baffled by the hostility of the townspeople about giving him the reward.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An elderly couple moves to North Fork under an assumed name to hide the fact that they are the parents of a vicious killer. The plan backfires when the son shows up at their home.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After foiling a girl's attempt to rob the general store, Lucas finds that she and her brother are plotting the murder of their abusive stepfather.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark discovers that the new preacher and his wife are impostors planning a robbery.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance get into trouble with the Army when they try to help a wounded young soldier who deserted.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas's returns to town in the company of a shady gambler and is accused of cheating at cards.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Several men are vying for a prosperous rancher's daughter's affections. When she is found dead, one of them becomes the prime suspect in her murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas receives a series of mysterious threatening notes from an ex-convict with a grudge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After shooting a man in self-defense, Andy Moon turns to Lucas for protection from the man's vengeful brothers.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: To keep his invalid mother happy, an outlaw forces Lucas and Mark to go along with a masquerade that he is the owner of Lucas's ranch.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The curator of a murderers' row in a soon-to-be-defunct wax museum persuades the owner to let him keep the figures for awhile.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bored, wealthy businessman gets a chance to go back in time and start over, armed with all the knowledge he's acquired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Toy designer Horace Ford spends most of his time reminiscing about his idyllic childhood. But when he gets a chance to go back to those years he gets a bitter taste of reality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man named Benteen leads a colony of Americans stranded on a desert planet for 30 years.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young couple book passage on a trans-Atlantic cruise, hoping to salvage their marriage.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An untalented would-be writer's career takes off when the ghost of William Shakespeare writes his script.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds are stranded on a distant planet.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Trying to keep up with his younger wife, Harmon convinces his brother to inject him with an experimental youth serum.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Twilight Zone

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick leads a risky mission for a possible small reward when the supplies run low and the group's mistrust of people grows.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others find themselves pitted against a nasty group but may have a plan to gain the upper hand.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Another group of survivors is introduced, and although things appear safe and nice, there is a bit of a dark side.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group must contend with a new set of issues while out on a mission, and must push through to survive.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Stakes are high when members of the group must go on a heroic rescue mission in a previously known location.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group is spread thin with some members holding down the church and the others on a rescue mission.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: New enemies disregard rules and morals; although Rick wants to find a peaceful agreement, the enemies seem to prefer a more violent resolution.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After facing all of the recent trials, a slight detour may offer the solution that the group has been seeking.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group feels beaten after living life on the road, but must continue to trudge along in spite of the changes they have incurred.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: After withstanding a spectacular storm, Rick and the others meet what appears to be a friendly person, but find themselves mistrustful.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group has a difficult time molding to a new lifestyle, forcing them to consider whether they can be the people they once were.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: As Rick and the others continue to acclimate to their new surroundings, they consider a return to normalcy.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: While trying to secure a new home, Rick and his group face challenges, and question the utopia they find themselves in.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: When life within the walls begins to mimic life outside, the group realizes that sheltered life may not be possible.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl finds trouble while on a run; Rick and the group feel like outsiders in Alexandria, where trouble approaches the gates.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the others have a difficult time assimilating into Alexandria; a new threat arises that could bring the group closer together.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne devuelve a Virgil a la isla misteriosa de la que proviene para que se reencuentre con su familia. A cambio, Virgil promete que le entregará un arsenal que cambiará el rumbo de la guerra contra los Susurradores.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Todos, héroes y villanos, se adaptan a las consecuencias del devastador incendio que destruyó la comunidad. Eugene encabeza a un grupo que parte en busca de Stephanie, guiados por la esperanza de encontrar otra civilización.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Princess asusta a los caballos de Eugene, Yumiko y Ezekiel, pero les promete otro medio de transporte. Mientras, Beta, en estado de delirio psicótico, guía a la horda de zombis hacia Alexandria para destruirlo todo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los seguidores de Beta se acercan a las puertas, y parte del grupo se impregna de sangre de zombi para intentar escapar entre la multitud de caminantes y regresar con ayuda. Sin embargo, los susurradores se mueven con cuchillos entre los zombis.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie regresa, para consternación de Negan. Los desafíos que superó desde su partida han hecho que se vuelva difícil sobrevivir para ella y su hijo. Por otro lado, Daryl y Maggie luchan inesperadamente contra una amenaza invisible y desconocida.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol encuentran una vieja cabaña que provoca que Daryl recuerde sus años alejado del grupo después de que Rick desapareció. Además, revive el doloroso recuerdo de encontrarse con un sobreviviente y los eventos tóxicos con Dog.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Gabriel y Aaron buscan comida y suministros para llevarlos de regreso a Alexandria, utilizando el mapa de Maggie. En su búsqueda de una ubicación más, encuentran un escondite, pero la fe se rompe y el optimismo se resquebraja.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene, Ezekiel, Yumiko y Princess son capturados y separados por los misteriosos soldados que los rodeaban en la estación ferroviaria. Princess lucha con los recuerdos de su traumático pasado y planea escapar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Carol toman caminos separados. Ella regresa a Alexandria, mientras él se adentra en los bosques. A partir de este momento, cado uno deberá usar sus habilidades de supervivencia.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie vuelve a Alexandria mientras Carol lleva a Negan a un viaje para minimizar la tensión en aumento. Negan reflexiona sobre su difunta esposa Lucille.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl lidera un equipo de misión para buscar en la base militar que descubrió. Por su parte, Maggie cuenta su historia, lo que impulsa una nueva misión de supervivencia que solo Negan puede liderar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La misión de Maggie lleva al equipo a través de un túnel del metro plagado de zombis y con el problema añadido de Negan. En el grupo de Eugene, Yumiko busca respuestas acerca de su hermano.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los Reapers aprovechan que el equipo de la misión de Maggie se ha separado para atacarlos. Carol, Rosita, Magna y Kelly intentan capturar caballos para llevarlos a Alexandria. Judith, RJ, Hershel y Gracie asimilan que sus padres están lejos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl y Dog son capturados por los Reapers. Luego son llevados al Meridiano y se vuelven a conectar con una figura familiar de su pasado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron, Carol, Lydia y Jerry van a las ruinas de Hilltop en busca de herramientas. El grupo de Eugene se somete a la orientación del Commonwealth. Maggie y Negan atraviesan el bosque. Judith y el resto de niños se enfrentan a los adolescentes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon determine to track down a missing Albanian princess when the regal young lady they have been guarding turns out to be an impostor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Cheyenne Indians are believed responsible for the daily death of five laborers whoare working to construct a railroad line. It is claimed that the Indians will stop the attacks if they are paid $500,000 in gold spikes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West fights off an unprovoked knife-wielding assailant and then meets a beautiful blonde named Marie.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. agent James T. West enlists in a secret army of fanatics whose demented leader is plotting to overthrow United States Army units stationed in the Southwest.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon go after Dr. Cadwallader, demented geologist who is systematically devastating the state of Wyoming with man-made earthquakes.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Gov. Bradford and his secretary, Miss Piecemeal, watch as the governor's statue is unveiled during a private showing at the Bolt Museum. Suddenly, the statue blinks, and Bradford, immobilized by an injection, is taken prisoner.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: U.S. secret agent James T. West is lured into a hospital where he is gassed and carried out in a coffin by the weird, zombie-like aides of one Dr. Arcularis.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West poses as a notorious desperado, Frank Slade, inaplan to arrest a Mexican bandit, Colonel Vasquez, who has been robbing banks in American border towns and then fleeing to the sanctuary of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Iron Man Torres strangles a shop owner named Gilbert as secret agent James T. West passes by.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon set out to crack a thriving opium-and-alien smuggling operation in San Francisco and become involved in struggle for control of Hunan Province, China.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent James T. West is investigating the loss of government suppliers of kerosene and copper when his stagecoach is halted by a sheet of flame.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon, assigned to protect a Middle Eastern despot from assassination, find their task complicated by the attitude of the degenerate tyrant, Emir El Emid.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agents James T. West and Artemus Gordon help Governor Lewis keep the state of California solvent by seeing that a pledged $5,000,000 from each of three wealthy but disreputable personsis turned over to the governor.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Two U.S. Supreme Court Justices have died mysteriously but Justice Chaynedis misses secret agent James T. West's concern for his life.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new season kicks off with a ranch house in Westerly, RI. Tom and Kevin tour the house and admire the paneling. Richard tours the basement with Jeff. Jenn and Roger consider landscape options.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Mark and Jeff take down the chimney. Scott and Shayla window shop. Jeff and Richard find new plumbing products. The ranch’s exterior walls come down. Jeff decides to reuse the original rafters.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The crew places a center beam to support the second story. A hole is cut in the original foundation for a new window. Kevin visits an engineered lumber factory. Tommy and Jeff raise the end gables.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The gambrel roof profiles are raised. The crew stands up the second-floor walls. Tommy shows the new apprentices how to cut roof rafters. Richard works on the project’s septic system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy teaches the new apprentices to frame a deck. Jeff’s crew frames the exterior flair detail. Jenn learns about Westerly granite. Jeff installs a window. Richard and Jeff work on the drain stacks.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin reviews the progress of the Westerly house. Tommy and Jeff install the main staircase. Kevin looks at clapboard siding technology. Richard watches the furnace being installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tommy and Jeff work on a coffered ceiling. Jenn watches granite get cut for the backyard steps. Richard reviews the septic system. Jeff installs the interior doors.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The new propane tank goes in. Norm advises on composite decking. Jeff and Tommy add final touches to the coffered ceiling. Shelving goes into the office. Mark applies a stone veneer to the chimney.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Jeff shows Kevin how he installs shelves and a mantel. Norm panels the playroom. Kevin visits the apprentices at a timber framing school. Jenn uses granite for backyard steps.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm uses old pine to make a coffee table. Mauro teaches apprentice Kathryn to whitewash paneling. Tommy and Jeff build a pergola for the deck. Kevin helps with a shutter assembly.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Televisions are installed; Blinds and curtains; Water heater; Plants and outdoor lighting; Flagpole.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin and Tommy take the tour with the homeowners and Jeff. Norm presents his pine coffee table. Jenn gives Tommy the garden tour. Everyone meets at the flagpole to raise the flags.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A year after California’s worst wildfire, the people of Paradise are still clearing the devastation. About 90% of the homes were lost. Kevin, Tom, and Richard meet families determined to rebuild.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The homeowner fabricates a stone hearth. Richard learns about automatic sprinkler systems. Kevin sees a simulator that shows how the Camp Fire spread. Tom inspects a vent designed to resist embers.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Luke and Crystal move in. Kevin visits a fire test lab. Jose and Anna’s house gets roof shingles. Mark installs a stone veneer. Kevin tours farms. Jenn meets an architect who designed a town memorial.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Paradise residents discuss rebuilding. Tom inspects engineered siding. Richard looks at a backup battery. A former fire chief discusses preparation. At the Memorial, heroes and survivors are honored.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Jack and Janet find a new roommate after Cindy moves off to dormitory life at nearby UCLA. She's Terri Alden, an emergency room nurse who starts off on the wrong foot with Jack in this sixth-season opener.

programme.title: Three's Company
programme.desc: Larry has made his choice for a new roommate and Jack and Larry begin devising a plan to get rid of Terri.

programme.title: Three's Company

programme.desc: Terri and Jack believe that Janet will have to make it with her dance instructor if she wants to make it as a dancer.

programme.desc: Jack and Janet mistake Terri's psychiatric friend for an escapee from a hospital psychiatric ward.

programme.desc: Larry devises an acid test to see if Furley's latest find is actually a gold-digger.

programme.desc: The trio reluctantly take on former roommate Cindy as their cleaning woman.

programme.desc: Jack adopts a new image and changes his career plans to please an affluent woman who'd like to marry him.

programme.desc: Jack challenges a famous food critic to sample his cuisine, aiming for a favorable review in his newspaper column.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Yuri Foreman
programme.desc: On June 5th, 2010, Miguel Cotto defeated Yuri Foreman at Yankee Stadium, claiming the WBA Super Welterweight title. Foreman's knee injury hindered his performance and Cotto won by TKO in the 9th round.

programme.title: Tyson Fury vs Deontay Wilder 3
programme.desc: On October 9th, 2021, Tyson Fury fought Deontay Wilder in their third and final matchup against each other at T-Mobile Arena in Las Vegas. In a thrilling fight, Fury once again proved his dominance, defeating Wilder by an 11th-round TKO.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Thomas Tate
programme.desc: On May 27th, 1994 Roy Jones Jr. went up against Thomas Tate in a 12 round bout for the IBF World Middleweight title that ended in the second round by technical knockout giving Jones Jr. the win.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Ricardo Mayorga
programme.desc: On March 12th, 2011, Miguel Cotto fought Ricardo Mayorga for the World Super Welterweight Championship at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas. In a great fight, Miguel Cotto prevailed, knocking down Mayorga in the final round and getting the stoppage.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Julio Ceasar Gonzalez
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001 Roy Jones Jr and Julio Ceasar Gonzalez battled for IBA, IBF, IBO, WBA and WBC World Light Heavyweight titles at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in a win for Jones with a unanimous decsion.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On June 9th, 2007, Miguel Cotto fought Zab Judah in a welterweight championship bout at Madison Square Garden in New York. Cotto emerged victorious with a TKO in the 11th round, solidifying his reputation as a formidable welterweight champion.

programme.title: Michael Carbajal vs Humberto Gonzalez 1
programme.desc: On March 13th, 1993, Michael Carbajal fought Humberto Gonzalez for the WBC and IBF Light Flyweight Titles in Las Vegas. After being knocked down twice earlier in the fight, Carbajal made an incredible comeback, knocking out Gonzalez in the 7th round.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Delvin Rodriguez
programme.desc: On October 5th, 2013 Miguel Cotto battled Delvin Rodriguez at the Amway Center in Orlando, Fl. The originally twelve round bout lasted three rounds and ended by technical knockout in third round securing the victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Mike Tyson vs Lorenzo Canady
programme.desc: On August 15th, 1985 Mike Tyson and Lorenzo Canady fought eachother at Resorts International in Atlantic City that resulted in Tyson defeating Canady in the first round by Knockout.

programme.title: James Toney vs Dave Tiberi
programme.desc: On February 8th, 1992 James Toney faced Dave Tiberi for the IBF World Middleweight at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic City with a point deducted from Tiberi for a low blow the bout ended in a split decision win for Toney.

programme.title: Todd Foster vs Jeff Mayweather
programme.desc: On August 6th, 1992 Todd Foster fought Jeff Mayweather at Denton Field in Miles City with Mayweather going down in rounds 7 & 8 the bout resulted in a technical knockout victory for Foster.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Carl Frampton
programme.desc: On April 3rd, 2021 Jamel Herring fought Carl Frampton for WBO World Super Featherweight title in a 12 round bout at the Caesars Palace Dubai resulting in a technical knockout victory in the sixth round for Herring.

programme.title: Alexis Arguello vs Alfredo Escalera
programme.desc: On January 28th, 1978 Alexis Arguello fought Alfredo Escalera for the WBC World super featherweight title that ended in the 13th round.

programme.title: Jamel Herring vs Masayuki Ito
programme.desc: On May 25th, 2019 Jamel Herring and Masayuki Ito battled for the WBO super featherweight title in a 12 round bout at Osceola Heritage Park in Kissimmee, Fl. That ended in a unanimous decision victory for Herring.

programme.title: Janibek Alimkhanuly vs Hassan N'Dam N'Jikam
programme.desc: On November 20th, 2021, Janibek Alimkhanuly fought Hassan N'Dam N'Jikam in a middleweight championship bout at the Mandalay Bay in Las Vegas. Janibek was dominant from the start, scoring a knockdown in round three and stopping N'Jikam in round eight.

programme.title: Janibek Alimkhanuly vs Rob Brant
programme.desc: On June 26th 2021 Janibek Alimkhanuly battled Rob Brant for WBC Continental Americas middleweight title at the Virgin Hotels in Las Vegas with Brant going down in round 6 Alimkhanuly secured the victory in the eighth round.

programme.title: Eddie Mustafa Muhammad vs Marvin Johnson
programme.desc: On March 31st, 1980 Eddie Mustafa Muhammad fought Marvin Johnson for the WBA World Light Heavyweight title that went 11 out of 15 rounds and ended by technical knockout giving the victory to Muhammad.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals awaken on their home world of Cybertron, with no memory of how they got there. Unable to Transform, they are hunted down by mindless vehicle Transformer drones.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals learn how to transform and gain access to the Council Citadel. There, they learn that Megatron has taken over the planet and intends to wipe out all organic life.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: While searching for clues to their missing memories, Blackarachnia and Rattrap encounter Jetstorm, Thrust and Tankor – three deadly new Vehicon Generals created by Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: As the Vehicon Generals continue to hunt the Maximals, Rattrap discovers a counter-virus that helps him Transform – but once he starts, he can't stop.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals discover a new Beast Mode Maximal – a bat named Nightscream – and a mysterious fruit tree, neither of which should exist on the machine world of Cybertron.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Rattrap finally learns how to Transform, only to discover his Robot Mode has no weapons. With nowhere else to turn for protection, he strikes a deal with Megatron.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: The Maximals discover a junkyard facility where the robot shells of the missing Transformers are stored. Meanwhile, Blackarachnia is utterly convinced that Thrust's spark is Silverbolt's.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Cheetor leads a dangerous mission to try to bring out Tankor's old Maximal personality. In doing so, Rattrap discovers a major clue to the Maximal's missing memories and discovers that Tankor has Rhinox's spark. Jetstorm removes Blackarachnia's spark.

programme.title: Transformers: Beast Machines
programme.desc: Nightscream fights to retrieve Blackarachnia's stolen Spark. Meanwhile, Optimus is able to contact Rhinox's Spark, but Rhinox deals him a major surprise.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Robots are truly in disguise when the Autobots pose as Stunticons to uncover Megatron's latest plan involving the thefts of some high-profile materials.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car—a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Autobots participate in a charity road race to watch over an experimental race car - a car made of a special type of material Megatron needs to complete his latest doomsday weapon, a weather-dominating device capable of mass destruction.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: The Aerialbots are thrown back in time to Cybertron's Golden Age. While there, they learn the truth of Megatron's early treachery as well as witness firsthand the creation of Cybertron's greatest hero, Optimus Prime!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Megatron becomes infected with cosmic rust, a metal-consuming plague. When Autobot scientist Perceptor is forced to find a cure for Megatron, the entire Autobot civilization is again put at risk of extinction. But an Autobot invention may save them...

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: After a failed attempt on Megatron's life, Starscream is banished to a deserted island. There he finds the remains of World War II battle vehicles and decides to use them as the basis for his own attack team, the Combaticons.

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: United as “Bruticus,” the Combaticons are virtually unstoppable. They plan to pull the Earth into the Sun to eliminate all of their enemies at once. The only hope is for the Autobots and Decepticons to join forces to take Bruticus down!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Aerialbots Slingshot and Skydive disguise themselves as normal jet fighters to expose a ring of human thieves stealing aircraft. But when they learn that Megatron is behind the scheme, they must combine with the other Aerialbots to convert into Superion!

programme.title: Transformers: Original Series
programme.desc: Three high school students create more trouble than they can handle when they use a Decepticon personality component in their science fair project. The Autobots come to rescue the students, but the science project may actually have to save the Autobots!

programme.desc: Chrissy has only a week to prepare for her clothing line's soft launch, and she is concerned that Jim is not taking her work seriously. Mama & Sassy decide to host a talk show, and they snag Ice-T as a special guest for the 1st episode. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Chrissy & Mr. Jones
programme.desc: Jim rewards Chrissy with a surprise ladies' night, but Chrissy isn't pleased with the ridiculous transportation he provides for her. Mama teams up with Chrissy to get revenge and use Jim's biggest fear against him. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Chrissy & Mr. Jones
programme.desc: Chrissy and Pudie want to arrange a day of family bonding in the woods, but first they have to find a way around Jim's paralyzing fear of nature. Meanwhile, Mama and Sassy unwind with a day at the spa. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Chrissy & Mr. Jones
programme.desc: Pudie's overjoyed when Jim gives him a HUGE stack of cash from the profits of Jr. Vamp. But when Chrissy points out that a ten-year-old shouldn't be walking around with that kind of money, Jim has to convince Pudie to give it back. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Chrissy & Mr. Jones
programme.desc: After a great summer, Pudie must head back to school while Jim and Chrissy are off to Miami for a well-deserved break. Jim and Chrissy are surprised to find they miss life with Pudie enough to cut their trip short. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Nicole Murphy, Andrea Kelly, Sheree Fletcher, Jessica Conseco, and Mayte Garcia are out to establish themselves as independent, successful women and bring relevance and honor to themselves separate from their very famous exes.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Despite warnings from her friends, Jessica seriously considers letting Jose move back in with her. Anxious to meet Mr. Right, Mayte resorts to a professional matchmaker, who urges her to de-Prince her home.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Just when Jessica thinks she might still be in love with Jose, she receives a bombshell from him. Meanwhile, Sheree and Terrell find themselves at odds over their long-distance marriage.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Anxious to escape the stress in their lives, the ladies head to Napa Valley for a weekend of fine food, fine wine, and (hopefully) fine men. On the trip, Jessica confronts Jose about his bad choices and gives him an ultimatum.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Nicole sets Mayte up on her first blind date, which stresses Mayte out. Meanwhile, Jessica breaks the news about Jose to Josie and then is shocked to learn that Josie is planning a visit to Planned Parenthood.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Tony sets Andrea up on a date with a local friend, but she worries how he will react when he finds out that R. Kelly is her ex. Meanwhile, Mayte plans a big party for her mother's birthday.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Controversy erupts during a weekend getaway to Palm Springs after Jessica accuses the others of being hypocrites. Not one to take it lightly, Sheree calls Jessica out.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: Back in L.A., resentments are still simmering after the altercation in Palm Springs. Mayte, who receives bad news from a fertility expert, is especially sensitive and confronts Jessica during a ladies night out.

programme.title: Hollywood Exes
programme.desc: The ladies take sides after the confrontation between Mayte and Jessica. Meanwhile, Andrea starts to feel pressure from Percy and worries that their relationship is moving too quickly.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn and Jen leave Miami to visit basketball fiancée Gloria Govan and Matt Barnes. Also, the girls go to a bust of a party that gets worse when they bump into an alleged groupie that may have been talking to Jen's husband. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Emotions get heated when Gloria defends her sister's role in an alleged scandal involving Shaunie. Suzie, Jen, and Royce make a splash when a second run-in with an alleged groupie turns into a fight on the streets of upscale Miami! Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Suzie's efforts to fix up Evelyn with a local producer crashes with a thud. Evelyn enrolls the girls into a self-defense class. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Jen's upcoming Haiti benefit inspires Royce to invite the girls to make a difference at a local soup kitchen. Also, some tender moments with Eric and Jen further clouds her decision to stay married. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie returns to Miami, and galpal Erikka is surprised by lingering feelings with ex-boyfriend and basketball player, Rasual Butler. Also, Evelyn takes her troubles with menacing texts to the next level, hiring a private investigator! Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie gives the girls a break from the Miami heat in her new hometown, Los Angeles. Will Jen decide to stand by her man or send him to the showers? Can Royce and Gloria get over themselves? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn draws the line with Susie over unchecked gossip about a hot weekend in Vegas. Also, Shaunie's attempt to bring Kenny Anderson's ex, Tami, into the circle is met with skepticism. The episode ends with a shocking surprise. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Fallout over Suzie and Evelyn's argument has Suzie on the run to an unexpected source….GLORIA! Also, Tami reintroduces her daughters to father Kenny Anderson after many years apart. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie and the ladies launch a surprise ambush on Gloria to find out why her wedding was called off. Jen and Eric finally have "the talk" that will alter the course of their relationship forever. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: When Evelyn and Jen find themselves left off the guest list of a posh fundraiser thrown by circle outsider Ashley Walker, they decide to crash the event. Tempers flare when Tami and Jen get into it over an innocuous remark. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn and Jen regret volunteering to help Royce and her man Dwayne with a fashion fundraiser. Also, Tami has some surgery done, helping her to lose pounds and setting the stage to gain a friend. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Evelyn is back on the dating scene with a date that ends with a miss…and then one with a kiss. The tension between Jen & Eric reaches a new mark. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: Shaunie's surprise announcement of a trip abroad delays Evelyn's connection with flirtatious football icon Chad Ochocinco. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives
programme.desc: The ladies' trip to Madrid suffers from both Royce's phantom illness and Tami's sudden mood swings. Jen also finds a romantic mark and the women get piggish on the local cuisine. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: In the season two premiere, Malaysia's desire to bring Jackie back into the group has the ladies baffled. Also, Laura and Gloria find that despite being sisters, they've grown apart. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie's surprise appearance at Gloria's cooking party leaves a bad taste in everyone's mouth. Also, Gloria lands a plum acting role and Draya's behavior at a photo shoot irks newcomer Brooke. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
